name: adler-functions
_packageManager: Use npm here, NOT pnpm. The `overrides` block pins uuid@9.0.1 to keep rpc-websockets (transitive via @solana/web3.js) on a CommonJS-compatible uuid. pnpm v11 doesn't honour the override for that transitive and bumps uuid to 14 (ESM-only), which crashes the Functions runtime with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM. functions/pnpm-lock.yaml is gitignored.
